_comment: SSL 2026 house voice — locked 22 Apr 2026 after 2 rounds of A/B/C testing on Danny's Pro clone. Winner: variant-b-090. Use this preset as default_voice_settings for all SSL 2026 Remotion VO going forward. Text style: em-dashes + extra commas for cadence (do NOT use SSML <break> tags).
text_style_rules: Use em-dashes (—) for mid-sentence pauses that are beats, not full stops.
Use extra commas to slow key phrases, e.g. 'and particularly, the work...'
Do NOT use SSML <break> tags — natural punctuation only.
Keep sentences short. 1 idea per sentence.

rounds_tested.round_1_ABC: A (clean) / B (em-dash pacing) / C (stability 0.20 expressive) — Danny picked B
rounds_tested.round_2_speed: B@0.80 / B1@0.85 / B2@0.90 / B3@0.95 — Danny picked B2 (0.90) as the pocket

future_work: Round 3: per-word pitch bump on 'guys' in 'Hey guys' (micro-amount). Requires DSP post-processing — ElevenLabs API can't do per-word pitch. See task #13.
